description_long: This is a modern, two-story bungalow featuring a flat roof and extensive use of wood and glass. The structure is surrounded by palm trees and includes multiple outdoor amenities such as a large swimming pool, a smaller pool or hot tub, and a covered patio area. The upper level has a spacious deck with lounge furniture and a hot tub, while the lower level includes a carport with visible parked cars and a wooden walkway leading to the main entrance. The building's facade is characterized by large, floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The landscaping is minimalist, with manicured grass patches and geometric pool layouts, emphasizing a luxurious and contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, two-story bungalow with flat roofs, expansive glass windows, wooden decks, pools, and palm trees, exuding a luxurious and contemporary style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, carport, large pool, wooden walkways, and upper deck with lounge areas.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the upper deck, hot tub, and the geometric arrangement of pools and palm trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, upper deck, and the full extent of the pool and patio area.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the carport, upper deck with furniture, and the connection between the house and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding glass doors
